messages.message:
Error: Cannot create components during render

Components created during render will reset their state each time they are created. Declare components outside of render.

suppressedMessages.message: React Hook useEffect has missing dependencies: 'handleOpenFile' and 'handleSaveFile'. Either include them or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [createNote, closeTab, activeNote, handleOpenFile, handleSaveFile]
